case_title: HALEY MICHAELS ET AL VS. REED KALNA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF HALEY MICHAELS AND JONATHAN DOWDALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REED KALNA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2021 - JUDGMENT.
